name: ag-notify
description: Plays simple sound notifications when the Google Antigravity Agent finishes a task.

agNotify.soundOnComplete.description: Play a sound when the agent completes its final response.

agNotify.soundOnCompleteType.description: Choose one of the 10 built-in MP3 chimes or specify an absolute path to a custom WAV/MP3 file.

agNotify.soundOnSend.description: Play a sound when you send a message in the chat.

agNotify.soundOnSendType.description: Choose one of the 10 built-in MP3 chimes or specify an absolute path to a custom WAV/MP3 file to play when sending a message.

agNotify.enabled.description: Global toggle to enable or disable all sound notifications.
